note: Internal sanity check only (build green, matrix covered). This is NOT verification -- self-verification (invariant I4) is explicitly out of scope for this agent; /cdr:verify performs real verification.

two_bugs_found_and_fixed_during_self_con: Test assumption error (not a product bug): initial PutEdge_WeightIncrement_ViaCompact/PutEdge_Compact_GraphNeighbors tests wrongly assumed a fixture-seeded ENTITY_COOCCUR edge would be folded in by graph.Compact; corrected once observed that f.graphPath/compacted-from-log is a fresh path distinct from the fixture's in-memory adjacency, so there is no pre-existing on-disk snapshot to sum with -- expected weight is exactly the sum of PutEdge calls in the test, not +7.

Real product gap in server.go's LookupEntity: PrefixScan does not special-case btree's reservedNodeID (0, i.e. an entity index that has never had anything inserted), and surfaced as codes.Internal instead of an empty result for LookupEntity_NotFound on a freshly-created (never-populated) entity index. Fixed by having LookupEntity check s.entityIndex.Root() == 0 and return an empty LookupEntityResponse{} directly in that case, before calling PrefixScan -- consistent with LookupEntity's documented not-found=empty-not-error contract.

python_side.confirms: regenerated hivemind_pb2*.py/.pyi stubs did not break any existing Python test; agents/ingestion/wiring.py has zero diff (git diff --stat confirms empty output)

validation_matrix_coverage: All 19 rows (V1-V19) in validation-matrix.json exercised by the tests listed above plus the existing (unmodified) Python test suite for V19.
